title: A Multimodal Vision Transformer-based Modeling Framework for Prediction of Fluid Flows in Energy Systems
summary: arXiv:2604.02483v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Computational fluid dynamics (CFD) simulations of complex fluid flows in energy systems are prohibitively expensive due to strong nonlinearities and multiscale-multiphysics interactions. In this work, we present a transformer-based modeling framework for prediction of fluid flows, and demonstrate it

title: Alibaba's Qwen team built HopChain to fix how AI vision models fall apart during multi-step reasoning
summary: When AI models reason about images, small perceptual errors compound across multiple steps and produce wrong answers. Alibaba's HopChain framework tackles this by generating multi-stage image questions that break complex problems into linked individual steps, forcing models to verify each visual detail before drawing conclusions.
